use_cases: Display animated statistics and metrics on dashboards
Show live counting numbers for user engagement metrics
Present financial data with smooth number transitions
Display progress indicators with animated counts
Show live follower or subscriber counts
ai_summary: An animated counter component that smoothly counts from a start value to an end value using spring physics for digit transitions. Each digit animates independently with Framer Motion's useSpring, creating a smooth rolling effect. Configurable duration, font size, and supports large numbers with proper digit placeholders.
